'''Roviden Belden''' was the son (and only child) of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakuran]] senator [[Orn Belden]] and his wife, [[Eppie Belden]]. He was an [[operative]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], and was executed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] when it annexed Bakura in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].
